Scene details: 🎯 STRATEGIC OBJECTIVES ### Primary Goals 1. **Increase Session Duration:** 3+ minutes average (currently strong with blog content) 2. **Increase Pages Per Session:** 2.5+ pages average (cross-article navigation) 3. Camera: full-frame, 35mm lens, balanced composition, natural depth of field. Lighting: realistic, soft natural or practical lighting, no harsh artificial glow. Strict realism: natural textures, accurate proportions, realistic lighting, no CGI look, no surreal symmetry. Avoid: logos, watermarks, fake UI buttons, text overlays. Style: photoreal.
